description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:1.9.2 Docker image. Set a before_script that creates /go/src/gitlab.com/pkuyken and /go/src/_/builds directories, copies the project into /go/src/gitlab.com/pkuyken/hexmap-generator, creates a symlink from /go/src/_/builds/pkuyken to the project path, and runs make dep for all jobs. Define two stages: test and build, with a cache of /apt-cache and Go module directories under /go/src. In the test stage add a lint_code job that runs make lint and a unit_tests job that runs make test. In the build stage add a build job that runs make.
